posts.text: The Trump administration has banned federal agencies from using Anthropic’s AI tools. @zannymb asks Dario Amodei about the clash—and the difficulty of preventing a race to the bottom. Watch on Thursday from 6pm London time https://www.economist.com/insider/the-insider/zanny-minton-beddoes-interviews-anthropics-boss?taid=69a93354cd818f0001220a9e&utm_campaign=trueanthem&utm_medium=social&utm_source=twitter
